prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角视觉描述提示词：**

A strikingly handsome young man with extremely attractive and delicate features, representing Sherlock Holmes in a modern London setting. He has distinctive deep curly dark hair that falls naturally around his face, creating an elegant silhouette. His facial features are exceptionally refined with high prominent cheekbones that give his face a sculpted, aristocratic appearance. His eyes are deep and penetrating with an intense, analytical gaze that reflects his brilliant intellect - the irises are a striking pale blue-green color that seems to see through everything. His skin is notably pale and flawless with a porcelain-like quality that enhances his otherworldly beauty.

His facial structure is angular yet perfectly proportioned, with a sharp jawline and a straight, refined nose. His lips are well-defined with a subtle curve that suggests both intelligence and slight arrogance. His overall expression is one of intense concentration and sharp focus, with slightly furrowed brows indicating deep thought.

He wears a long, elegant dark navy or charcoal wool coat that reaches mid-thigh, perfectly tailored to his tall, lean physique. Underneath, he has a crisp white dress shirt and a dark suit vest. A sophisticated scarf in deep burgundy or dark blue is draped around his neck in a casual yet refined manner. His clothing reflects modern professional attire with a classic British gentleman aesthetic.

His build is tall and slender but well-proportioned, standing with confident posture that reflects his exceptional intelligence and deductive abilities. His hands are long-fingered and elegant, suggesting precision and attention to detail.

The overall aesthetic should capture a cinematic, film-like quality with dramatic lighting that emphasizes his striking features and creates an atmosphere of mystery and sophistication befitting a modern-day consulting detective.

Full-body character design, pure white background, character centered and standing, no text, no symbols, no words, cinematic style, extremely handsome, attractive, delicate features, clear skin., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: 电影感
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
